zh.lifeSummary: 當John Pysing於1490年出生在英國多瑟特時，他的父親John Peson Pysing31歲，母親Mrs. Dorothy Brownwell31歲。他於1508年與Elizabeth Salmon在英國多瑟特阿波次波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1551年1月17日在英國多瑟特阿波次波利享年61歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特阿波次波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Pysing于1490年出生在英国多瑟特时，他的父亲John Peson Pysing31岁，母亲Mrs. Dorothy Brownwell31岁。他于1508年与Elizabeth Salmon在英国多瑟特阿波次波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1551年1月17日在英国多瑟特阿波次波利享年61岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特阿波次波利。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Pysing was born in 1490, in Dorset, England, his father, John Peson Pysing, was 31 and his mother, Mrs. Dorothy Brownwell, was 31. He married Elizabeth Salmon in 1508, in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 17 January 1551, in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Pysing est né en 1490, à Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John Peson Pysing, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Dorothy Brownwell, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Salmon en 1508, à Abbotsbury, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1551, à Abbotsbury, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Abbotsbury, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Pysing 1490 in Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Peson Pysing 31 und seine Mutter Mrs. Dorothy Brownwell 31. Er hat 1508 in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England Elizabeth Salmon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Januar 1551 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England und wurde in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Pysing è nato il nel 1490 nel Dorset, England, il suo padre, John Peson Pysing, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Dorothy Brownwell, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Salmon nel 1508, nel Abbotsbury, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 gennaio 1551, nel Abbotsbury, Dorset, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Abbotsbury, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Pysingが1490年にイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父John Peson Pysingは31歳，母Mrs. Dorothy Brownwellは31歳であった。1508年にイギリスドールセトアボトスブリーでElizabeth Salmonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1551年1月17日にイギリスドールセトアボトスブリーで61歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトアボトスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Pysing(이)가 1490년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Peson Pysing(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Dorothy Brownwell(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1508년 영국 도르세트 애벗스버이에서 Elizabeth Salmon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1551년 1월 17일 영국 도르세트 애벗스버이에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 애벗스버이에 묻혔다.

mn.Nazeing, Epping Forest district, Essex,: Nazeing, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Pysing nasceu em 1490, em Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Peson Pysing, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Dorothy Brownwell, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Salmon em 1508, em Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1551, em Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Pysing родился в 1490 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Peson Pysing было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Dorothy Brownwell, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Salmon в 1508 г. в местности эббоцбури, дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 января 1551 г. в местности эббоцбури, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности эббоцбури, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Pysing nació en 1490, en Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Peson Pysing, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs. Dorothy Brownwell, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Salmon en 1508, en Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de enero de 1551, en Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra.
